summary: Iteration 56: Split Payment Allocation Bug Fix - ALL TESTS PASSED. The fix properly allocates split payment amounts to their respective totals: cash_amount goes to cash_total, digital_amount goes to digital_total. Previously, split invoices had their entire grand_total counted in digital_total. Backend /api/invoices/history/by-date and /api/dashboard endpoints correctly separate the amounts. Frontend Sales History board shows correct totals and split invoices display 'Split · GCash' indigo badge instead of just 'GCash' blue badge.

SPLIT_PAYMENT_ALLOCATION_BUG_FIX.GET /api/invoices/history/by-date splits: PASS - cash_amount=612 → cash_total, digital_amount=408 → digital_total for SI-20260226-0117
SPLIT_PAYMENT_ALLOCATION_BUG_FIX.Pure digital payments go entirely to dig: PASS - payment_type=digital invoices sum to digital_total (2440.0)
SPLIT_PAYMENT_ALLOCATION_BUG_FIX.Cash payments go entirely to cash total: PASS - payment_type=cash/null invoices sum to cash_total (38130.0)
SPLIT_PAYMENT_ALLOCATION_BUG_FIX.Credit payments go entirely to credit to: PASS - payment_type=credit/partial invoices sum to credit_total (14950.0)
SPLIT_PAYMENT_ALLOCATION_BUG_FIX.Split payments properly separated: PASS - 8 split invoices found, cash contributions (3566.0) and digital contributions (3974.0) correctly allocated

DASHBOARD_SPLIT_ALLOCATION.GET /api/dashboard/stats separates split: PASS - today_cash_sales and today_digital_sales include respective split portions
DASHBOARD_SPLIT_ALLOCATION.GET /api/dashboard/branch-summary separa: PASS - Branch cards show separated cash and digital amounts from splits

FRONTEND_BADGE_DISPLAY.Split invoices show 'Split · GCash' indi: PASS - 8 split invoices have indigo badges with 'Split · {platform}' format
FRONTEND_BADGE_DISPLAY.Pure digital invoices show blue badge: PASS - 3 pure digital invoices show blue 'GCash/Maya' badges
FRONTEND_BADGE_DISPLAY.Cash invoices show green badge: PASS - 31 cash invoices show emerald 'Cash' badges
FRONTEND_BADGE_DISPLAY.Credit invoices show amber badge: PASS - 10 credit invoices show amber 'Credit' badges

critical_code_review_comments: Backend invoices.py lines 739-764: Correctly computes cash_total from cash/null payment_type invoices, then adds split cash_amount in separate loop
Backend invoices.py lines 747-758: digital_total computed from payment_type=digital, then split digital_amount added separately
Backend dashboard.py lines 134-150: Same split allocation pattern applied to dashboard stats
Backend dashboard.py lines 396-409: Branch summary cards also properly separate split amounts
Frontend UnifiedSalesPage.js lines 901-903: badgeInfo correctly returns 'Split · {platform}' with indigo styling for split payments
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing split invoices SI-20260226-0114 through 0122 and SI-20260226-0002
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 56 verified the split payment allocation bug fix. Key change: GET /api/invoices/history/by-date now properly separates split payment amounts - cash_amount goes to cash_total, digital_amount goes to digital_total. Before the fix, entire grand_total of split invoices was counted in digital_total. The split invoices have payment_type='split' and store cash_amount/digital_amount fields. Frontend badge for splits shows 'Split · GCash' (indigo) instead of just 'GCash' (blue). All 5 stat cards in Sales History board work correctly: Cash Sales, Digital Sales, Credit Sales, Grand Total, Transactions. Dashboard endpoints also have the same fix applied.
